creator: mi@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Koichiro IWAO from comment #2)
> xrdp is a server of RDP protocol. x11rdp is a X server
> designed to cooperate with xrdp.

Ok, why, then, does x11rdp conflict with xrdp-devel?

Also, why does the source for x11rdp have to come from your own server -- and include various other bits of Xorg-tree in it?
